item.dc:creator: tehtariksghost

item.title: Yay, I guess.
item.description: I just want to scream into the void. I was so ecstatic about receiving this only to have my serotonin ripped away by the VP of operations. To add more info, the company has paid for other people for this exact award in years prior, but are suddenly adding an extra stipulation for me. They even asked the awarding authority who nominated me, as if they didn't want me to recieve it and/or are upset about the recognition. No congrats, no good job. Just questions and a refusal to send me to the conference. They said I could go if I pay for it. I'm doing fine financially but don't have 1.5K just sitting around for travel and lodging. To add insult to injury, the company is sending other people who aren't up for the award. Time to start rage applying.
item.dc:creator: amaterasu93

item.title: Found dead in his truck from "self-inflicted wound"
item.description: I don't buy into conspiracy theories, but I wouldn't be surprised to find Boeing played some part in this since he was in the middle of giving testimony against the company. In particular, he was aware of sub-standard parts being pulled from the piles of rejected parts and installed in planes to be delivered so Boeing could try to meet delivery deadlines. https://www.bbc.com/news/business-68534703
item.dc:creator: cantbelievethisisstillavailable

item.title: The Simpsons fan art part 2
item.dc:creator: Rizzivision

item.title: "Did You Know? The Bearded Vulture Loves Eating Bones!"
item.description: Bearded vultures have stomach acid with a pH level below one, which means it can dissolve skin, bone, teeth, and hooves. Large bones, like the ones in the video, take approximately 24 hours to dissolve completely.
item.dc:creator: TutsNest

item.title: RIP Innocent Man
item.description:
Dennis Fritz. RIP Sunday, March 10, 2024. Dennis was a friend of mine who was also wrongfully convicted and imprisoned. He was convicted, along with Ron Williamson, of murder in Ada Oklahoma.
The book "The Innocent Man" written by John Grisham, is essentially his story.
Dennis and John Grisham
Dennis and his daughter
Being exonerated is a feeling that cannot be described. I will miss my friend.
item.dc:creator: BrandonMoon

item.title: No its not my vid, but I just love the pooches eyes...
item.dc:creator: greenishbrownfemalesheep

item.title: I'm just so tired.
item.description: I came out October 2022. I've been doing everything I can to help them understand and offered them so many chances to try to learn more about me and to hear from me while standing firm on my identity, but they've cowered behind faith and their "good intentions" as a shield. Through all of this, they constantly spout that they love me. I don't doubt that they love and miss their idea of me, but that person isn't me. It hasn't been me. It probably never was me. I can't even muster up the energy to be angry or sad. I'm not sure if I really even feel pity. I'm just so tired of trying to keep them in my life when they don't want me as I really am in theirs. That last message I sent is probably the last thing I'll say to them. The worst part is I still love them. FP EDIT: Thank you for all the support everyone, I really appreciate it and really needed this today. As for the suggestions as to how to respond... I think I'm just not going to. If they're not gonna bother to show me basic respect I'm not gonna waste mental or emotional energy on them. SECOND EDIT: Once again, I appreciate the support, suggestions, ideas, everything. One common one I'm seeing is the suggestion of trying to "give them time," but it has been almost 18 months and I have openly pleaded with them to try to come to an understanding. At one point I wrote an approximately 2500-word letter begging them to ask me about my transition or my thought process, as much for my own benefit of having to put it into words as theirs to understand, and instead of making an effort, laser-focused on the suicidal ideation I'd mentioned and blamed me for hiding from them. I know the fundie types need time, but the blatant refusal to even TRY after repeated requests and offers, as well as back-tracking on using my chosen name and pronouns, just leaves me hopeless.
item.dc:creator: wantfastcars

item.title: Starfire -Beach Episode
item.description: Took my Starfire to the beach today for a bit of a photoshoot before I leave this lovely holiday spot and the sunshine disappears for the year. More photos on my kofi page if you wanna see!

item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: Every morning and every night I send my college-age sons and their SOs memes as an I love you. A mix of dad jokes, bizarre memes, words of affirmation, and energy music. Here are the most recent.
item.description:
I am not anymore, but I am confident I could be again in 20 minutes.
This is impressive, but not even the first video of the rubber band shooting dog I have seen.
But what about Chrome?
Shenanigans
When I say, “This is my jam,” this is what I mean.
This would be even better if instead of imitating laughter, the parrots were imitating songs from the Eagles. Then it would be a parrot, Eagles, contraband cover band.
Out! Out, demons of stupidity!
The Gate™️
Consider all your options.
Death blades.
Poker ♥️♦️♣️♠️?
Tenacious Dionysus
Strategery
It’s good to know they had his back.
That’s CAPTAIN Moopsy to you.
I ? U
Bunny Harvestman
Biology is fun.
Get off the road! HIDE!
It’s good to know you’re never alone. Now go to sleep.
I’m always here for you.
Chicken DRUMsticks.
Uplifting equestrian music
The Mob
Classical art
Two avocados

item.title: PSA: Mythbusting Imperialist Propaganda
item.description:
The Myth: Hamas broke a "permanent ceasefire" (even Israel puts it in quotes because its such a blatant lie).
Myth: Busted
item.dc:creator: jhill

item.title: The dump. The dump of reposts, the dump chosen especially to post reposts, reposts' dump. That dump?
item.description:
I saved this to show an uncle who loved his old Bronco. Its so pretty
He's right, you know.
Yep. My desk tasks would dissolve into chaos
For my teacher humans. They deal with far too many small humans, so that the rest of us hopefully have less fuckwits to deal with when those smalls start growing up
I read a dragonage fanfic once where a rage demon entered the world as a goose. It was glorious. It killed the occasional handsy nobleman
The middle blender now has an Oscar for Best Actor #spoilers
This. I liked this.
Shocking how many times I've explained how to attach a file to an email
Pms also does this to the Uterus Havers
Also me at my husband. And my husband at me. Both must provide coffee in exchange for the little songs
"Happiness in your household" tonal emphasis will get ya ever time
And the second time. And the ninth time.
I do as the Flame guides
Goddamn it
I love and hate that this checks out
Don't support munchkin kitties y'all, that's how we got horribly unwell small dogs
My security admin loved this
Babe wake up, new love language just dropped
The cold refreshing beverage. It sings to me, ricky
Whats that one country song where it turns out he's singing about his grandma?
It's almost spring. give me the plant.
Baby kitty
Hah
This. This is real. This happens to me all the damn time
YUP. I don't know why such a high percentage of IT professionals are furries, and at this point I'm afraid to ask
dO yOU HaVE anY iDEA HOW EXPENSIVE THOSE ARE. STOP IT.
I can name five women like this off the top of my head. Makes me sad.
cute
Sent this to my one friend who self identifies as Basic White Bitch. She confirmed twas the season
This. I love this. I do this. I regret in the morning
Potato luck
UGH more punative damage
My uncle's name is Fleep
The irish one, obviously
I...yes
I don't remember saving that one
Hah!
